tasks.label: kill: client ports from processes
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $workspace = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $clientPath = Join-Path $workspace 'client'; $matches = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -and (($_.CommandLine -like '*super-melee-client*') -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*vite*' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*' + $clientPath.Replace('\', '\\') + '*')) -or ($_.CommandLine -like '*npm run dev*' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*' + $workspace.Replace('\', '\\') + '*'))) }; if (-not $matches) { Write-Host 'No matching client processes found.'; exit 0 }; $pids = @($matches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty ProcessId -Unique); Write-Host 'Matching client processes:'; $matches | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, @{Name='CommandLine';Expression={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-Table -Wrap; $ports = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $pids -contains $_.OwningProcess } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty LocalPort -Unique | Sort-Object); if (-not $ports) { Write-Host 'No listening ports found for matching client processes.'; exit 0 }; Write-Host ('Killing client ports: ' + ($ports -join ', ')); $ports | ForEach-Object { npx --yes kill-port $_ | Out-Host }; exit 0
